categories.name: 过程信息

基本名称.zh: 磷酸铁锂动力电池湿法回收
基本名称.en: Wet recycling of lithium iron phosphate traction batteries

处理、标准、路线.zh: 拆解，粉碎，筛分，酸浸，除铁，转化脱杂，盐酸蒸馏回收
处理、标准、路线.en: Disassembly, crushing, screening, acid leaching, iron removal, impurity conversion and removal, hydrochloric acid distillation recovery

数据集一般性说明.zh: 本数据集描述中国磷酸铁锂动力电池湿法回收过程的清单数据，功能单位为处理 1 kg 废弃磷酸铁锂电池。系统边界从废弃电池进入回收设施开始，到产出氯化锂固体及各种固体废物和大气污染物结束。主要输入包括废弃 LFP 电池、盐酸（30%）、过氧化钠（7.5%）、氢氧化钠（32%）、氯化钙、去离子水和电力。主要输出为氯化锂固体产品，以及废弃塑料套管、废弃分离器、废弃 BMS、废铜、废铝、废石墨、其他固体废物，以及粉尘、氟化氢、挥发性有机物、盐酸雾等大气污染物。数据来源于安徽道明能源科技有限公司年回收 10 kt 废锂电池拆解及综合利用项目的环境影响报告。
数据集一般性说明.en:
This dataset describes the inventory for the wet recycling process of spent lithium iron phosphate traction batteries in China. The functional unit is treatment of 1 kg of spent LFP battery. The system boundary starts when the spent battery enters the recycling facility and ends when solid lithium chloride product and various solid wastes and air pollutants are generated. Main inputs include spent LFP battery, hydrochloric acid (30%), sodium peroxide (7.5%), sodium hydroxide (32%), calcium chloride, deionized water and electricity. Main outputs are lithium chloride solid product, together with waste plastic casing, waste separator, waste BMS, waste copper, waste aluminium, waste graphite, other solid wastes, as well as air pollutants including dust, hydrogen fluoride, volatile organic compounds and hydrochloric acid mist. The data are sourced from the environmental impact report of a 10 kt per year spent lithium battery disassembly and comprehensive utilization project of Anhui Daoming Energy Technology Co., Ltd.

This dataset describes the inventory for the wet recycling process of spent lithium iron phosphate traction batteries in China. The functional unit is treatment of 1 kg of spent LFP battery. The system boundary starts when the spent battery enters the recycling facility and ends when solid lithium chloride product and various solid wastes and air pollutants are generated. Main inputs include spent LFP battery, hydrochloric acid (30%), sodium peroxide (7.5%), sodium hydroxide (32%), calcium chloride, deionized water and electricity. Main outputs are lithium chloride solid product, together with waste plastic casing, waste separator, waste BMS, waste copper, waste aluminium, waste graphite, other solid wastes, as well as air pollutants including dust, hydrogen fluoride, volatile organic compounds and hydrochloric acid mist. The data are sourced from the environmental impact report of a 10 kt per year spent lithium battery disassembly and comprehensive utilization project of Anhui Daoming Energy Technology Co., Ltd.

This dataset describes the inventory for the wet recycling process of spent lithium iron phosphate traction batteries in China. The functional unit is treatment of 1 kg of spent LFP battery. The system boundary starts when the spent battery enters the recycling facility and ends when solid lithium chloride product and various solid wastes and air pollutants are generated. Main inputs include spent LFP battery, hydrochloric acid (30%), sodium peroxide (7.5%), sodium hydroxide (32%), calcium chloride, deionized water and electricity. Main outputs are lithium chloride solid product, together with waste plastic casing, waste separator, waste BMS, waste copper, waste aluminium, waste graphite, other solid wastes, as well as air pollutants including dust, hydrogen fluoride, volatile organic compounds and hydrochloric acid mist. The data are sourced from the environmental impact report of a 10 kt per year spent lithium battery disassembly and comprehensive utilization project of Anhui Daoming Energy Technology Co., Ltd.

分类.name: Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities
Waste collection, treatment and disposal, and recovery activities

description.zh:
基于全生命周期的磷酸铁锂动力电池循环
利用环境影响评价研究

descriptionOfRestrictions.#text: 数据代表中国安徽省该企业的典型工艺水平，可作为中国磷酸铁锂电池湿法回收的背景数据。
The data represent the typical technology level of this enterprise in Anhui province, China, and they can be used as background data for wet recycling of LFP batteries in China.

技术描述及背景系统.zh: 本单元过程的系统边界从废弃磷酸铁锂电池进入回收车间开始，到产出氯化锂固体产品和各类废物结束。主要步骤包括：电池放电后拆解、粉碎、筛分得到粉末；粉末经过盐酸酸浸，过氧化钠氧化除杂，氢氧化钠调节pH，氯化钙转化脱杂，以及盐酸蒸馏回收等工序，最终得到氯化锂固体。工艺流程遵循典型的湿法回收路线。
技术描述及背景系统.en: The system boundary of this unit process starts when the spent LFP battery enters the recycling workshop and ends when lithium chloride solid product and various wastes are generated. The main steps include: discharging, disassembly, crushing and screening to obtain powder; the powder then undergoes hydrochloric acid leaching, sodium peroxide oxidation for impurity removal, sodium hydroxide pH adjustment, calcium chloride conversion for impurity removal, and hydrochloric acid distillation recovery, finally producing lithium chloride solid. The process follows a typical wet recycling route.

利用环境影响评价研究

数据切断和完整性原则.zh: 本数据集覆盖了清单中贡献较大的物料与能源流。对于用量极小的辅助材料或维护物料进行了合理截断。所有输入输出均基于环评报告数据，部分大气污染物排放因子来自计算。质量守恒基本平衡，未计入厂内循环水。
数据切断和完整性原则.en: This dataset covers the material and energy flows that make relevant contributions to the inventory. Items with very small quantities, such as some auxiliary or maintenance materials, are reasonably cut off. All inputs and outputs are based on the environmental impact report, and some air pollutant emission factors come from calculations. Mass balance is approximately closed, and internal recirculating water is not included.

categories.name: 管理信息

预期应用.zh: 本数据集预期用于构建废弃磷酸铁锂电池回收利用的生命周期模型，可作为中国背景下湿法回收工艺过程的基础数据，支持动力电池循环利用的环境影响评价、技术对比和情景分析。
预期应用.en: This dataset is intended to be used in life cycle models of spent LFP battery recycling. It can serve as background data for the wet recycling process in the Chinese context, and it supports environmental impact assessment, technology comparison and scenario analysis for power battery circular utilization.
